THE STREAM GAUGE ON MUDDY CREEK NEAR MT CLINTON ROSE RAPIDLY ABOVE THE FLOOD STAGE OF 8.0 FT BETWEEN 415 AND 430 PM. WATER THREATENS LIVESTOCK FIELDS AND A BARN AT THESE LEVELS.

THE STREAM GAUGE ON MUDDY CREEK NEAR MT CLINTON ROSE RAPIDLY ABOVE THE FLOOD STAGE OF 8.0 FT AROUND 437 PM AND PEAKED AT 9.84 FEET AT 515 PM. OVERBANK FLOODING OF LIVESTOCK FIELDS AND BARNS OCCURS AT THESE LEVELS AND WATER APPROACHES NEARBY ROADWAYS.
